reason: tests need rewrite, not instruction: solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text, test_not_tautological, behavior_in_tests fail because tests check gold-specific implementation strings (exact loop pattern 'for (HttpRequest::Header *h = req->headers;', variable names contentLengthString, null checks, byte comparisons) via text search with no execution. instruction_no_hint_leakage and no_solution_leakage fail for the same reason — the required strings are the solution. The tests are tautological: an agent could insert comments matching all required strings without fixing any bug. gold patch is also corrupt (error: corrupt patch at line 44), making oracle validation impossible.
